# RootedAI

> Engineering Intelligence. COMPLEXITY. SIMPLIFIED.

RootedAI helps businesses scale efficiently through autonomous AI agents and intelligent process automation. We specialize in transforming manual, complex workflows into streamlined, self-running systems.

## Core Identity
- **Company Name**: RootedAI Solutions
- **Tagline**: Engineering Intelligence. COMPLEXITY. SIMPLIFIED.
- **Website**: https://www.rootedai.co.in
- **Contact**: info@rootedai.co.in
- **Location**: Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India (serving globally including Singapore, Dubai, Middle East, and Asia)

## Services

### AI Agents
Custom AI agent development for enterprise automation. We build digital workers that handle repetitive tasks like data entry, L1 support, invoicing, and multi-step workflows 24/7.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/ai-agents

### Process Automation
End-to-end business process automation using RPA and intelligent workflows. We reduce manual effort by 60-80% across HR, finance, and operations.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/process-automation

### Predictive Analytics
Data-driven analytics for demand forecasting, churn prediction, risk assessment, and trend analysis. Turn your data into actionable insights.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/predictive-analytics

### NLP Systems
Advanced Natural Language Processing solutions including sentiment analysis, document processing, automated reporting, and LLM fine-tuning.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/nlp-systems

### Web Solutions
Custom web application development with AI integration. Scalable web apps, enterprise dashboards, and progressive web apps (PWAs).
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/web-solutions

### Enterprise Security
AI-powered threat detection, compliance automation, vulnerability assessment, and zero-trust architecture implementation.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/enterprise-security

### IT Outsourcing
Flexible software development outsourcing including dedicated teams, staff augmentation, and project-based engagements.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/outsourcing

## Key Offerings
1. **AI Agents**: Digital workers that handle repetitive tasks like data entry, L1 support, and invoicing 24/7.
2. **Onboarding Automation**: Reducing hiring costs by 30% through AI-driven candidate screening and onboarding workflows.
3. **Logistics Optimization**: Intelligent routing and inventory management systems for manufacturing and supply chain.
4. **Custom Enterprise Solutions**: Bespoke AI "brains" that consolidate fragmented SaaS tools into a single dashboard.

## Value Proposition
- **For CEOs**: Reduce overheads and break the "hiring freeze" cycle.
- **For CTOs**: Eliminate "SaaS Sprawl" with owned, custom infrastructure.
- **For Operations**: Achieve 24/7 operational capability without adding headcount.
- **Cost Savings**: Clients typically see 40% reduction in operational costs.

## Technical Expertise
- **RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)**: Context-aware AI that knows your business data.
- **Multi-Agent Systems**: Coordinating specialized agents for complex problem solving.
- **Process Automation**: End-to-end workflow execution with RPA integration.
- **Machine Learning**: Custom ML models for prediction, classification, and anomaly detection.
- **Computer Vision**: Image/video analysis for quality control and monitoring.

## Case Studies
- **AI for Manufacturing in Asia**: Predictive maintenance agents for electronics manufacturers in Singapore and Vietnam. 35% downtime reduction, 24/7 autonomous monitoring.
- **Logistics Automation in Dubai**: Supply chain optimization for a major logistics firm. 20% fuel cost savings, 100% route optimization.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/case-studies

## Industries Served
- Manufacturing & Industrial
- Logistics & Supply Chain
- Healthcare & Pharma
- E-Commerce & Retail
- Financial Services
- Education & EdTech

- India (Hosur, Coimbatore headquarters)
- Singapore
- Dubai & Middle East
- Asia-Pacific region
- Global remote delivery
